subject: docs(specs): add universal quick-reference cheat sheet
body:
Added consolidated cheat sheet with primary formats for social media,
e-commerce, and ads. Includes the four master sizes (9:16, 4:5, 1:1,
1:1 large) for maximum cross-platform efficiency.

Tags: docs, specs, platforms, cheat-sheet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: platform-specs
Semver: patch
